cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently highlight the collaborative nature of the company and the value of the agent community.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members appreciate the investment in training and coaching programs designed to foster professional development.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees value the flexibility of their schedules, though this is balanced against the demanding nature of the industry.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: While some find the compensation structure rewarding, others report being underpaid relative to their workload.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees often describe a supportive and accountable environment that encourages professional success.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report feelings of isolation or note the presence of cliques that hinder a sense of inclusion.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: There are recurring mentions of being overworked and underpaid, leading to exhaustion and dissatisfaction.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees feel unrecognized or overlooked, citing a lack of mentorship and limited growth pathways.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees express difficulty in maintaining work-life balance, often citing the always-on nature of the industry.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of reviews highlights concerns regarding toxic behavior and a lack of psychological safety.
